rationale: The cited paper is used in the methods section to justify how the focal dependent variable (WTP) is elicited. The authors explicitly state they followed the BDM approach and cite Wertenbroch and Skiera (2002) as evidence that this procedure is incentive-compatible and has strong predictive performance. Because the citation supports core measurement design rather than serving as a generic literature mention, the role is substantive.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the Wertenbroch and Skiera (2002) BDM-based WTP elicitation approach in its experiments on cause-related marketing. The cited work provides methodological grounding for the paper's incentive-compatible WTP measurement.
